systems.system_notes: Tibial intramedullary nailing platform for tibial shaft and proximal/distal tibia fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official Stryker materials describe dedicated T2 Alpha Tibia instrumentation and targeting workflow.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the tibial nail platform for shaft and periarticular fracture fixation.
Official materials describe proximal and distal locking options within the T2 Alpha Tibia construct.
Official T2 Alpha Tibia materials describe end-cap compatibility for the tibial nail system.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public T2 Alpha Tibia page defines the tibial nail platform but does not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper operative technique or catalogue pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
